summary: Iteration 244 - Orbital Mixer & Module Registry Testing Complete. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Orbital Mixer features verified working. Console/Playground mode toggle works correctly. OrbitalMixer renders orbital rings with bubbles from moduleRegistry. Tap-to-toggle activates/deactivates modules. Active modules show visual feedback (glowing border, tether lines, hub dot count). Clear All button appears when modules are active and clears all on click. Locked modules (I Ching, Fractal L², Cosmic Map) show lock icons. Console mode accordion sections render correctly when mode is 'Console'. Mobile viewport shows larger touch targets and adjusted ring radii.
critical_code_review_comments: OrbitalMixer.js: Well-structured component with DraggableBubble, PlayerHub, RingLabel subcomponents
OrbitalMixer.js line 22-28: getOrbitalPosition calculates bubble positions on orbital rings
OrbitalMixer.js line 31-42: resolveModuleToMixerData maps registry modules to MixerContext data
OrbitalMixer.js line 45-52: isModuleActive checks if module is active in mixer state
OrbitalMixer.js line 57-259: DraggableBubble handles drag-and-drop with magnetic zone, snap radius, haptic feedback
OrbitalMixer.js line 265-339: PlayerHub shows active module dots, breathing animation, deactivate on dot click
OrbitalMixer.js line 370-625: OrbitalMixer main component with ring guides, group labels, tether SVG lines
OrbitalMixer.js line 577-601: Clear All button with AnimatePresence animation
moduleRegistry.js: Clean module definitions with type, name, color, ring assignment
moduleRegistry.js line 62-64: Combined registry using Object.fromEntries for O(1) lookup
moduleRegistry.js line 67-72: MODULE_GROUPS for UI rendering with label and color
CosmicMixerPage.js line 694-718: Mode toggle buttons with data-testid attributes
CosmicMixerPage.js line 721-725: OrbitalMixer renders only when mixerMode === 'playground'
CosmicMixerPage.js line 728: Console accordion sections hidden via display:none when playground active
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 244 verified: (1) Console/Playground mode toggle (data-testid='mixer-mode-toggle', 'mixer-mode-console', 'mixer-mode-playground') works correctly. (2) OrbitalMixer (data-testid='orbital-mixer') renders in Playground mode with orbital rings and bubbles. (3) PlayerHub (data-testid='orbital-player-hub') shows 'Drop here' when empty, shows active module dots when modules active. (4) Orbital bubbles have data-testid='orbital-bubble-{id}' format (e.g., orbital-bubble-freq_432, orbital-bubble-sound_ocean, orbital-bubble-inst_tanpura). (5) Tap-to-toggle works - clicking bubble activates/deactivates module. (6) Active modules show glowing border, tether SVG lines from hub to bubble, hub shows '{n} active' text. (7) Clear All button (data-testid='orbital-clear-all') appears when modules active, clears all on click. (8) Locked modules (ICHING_01, FRACTAL_L2, GPS_MAP) show lock icon and are not draggable. (9) Ring labels (data-testid='ring-label-{group}') show group names. (10) Console mode accordion sections hidden via display:none when Playground active. (11) Mobile viewport (390x844) shows larger touch targets (52px vs 44px desktop) and adjusted ring radii. (12) Waveform visualizer (data-testid='waveform-visualizer') shows audio activity when modules active. (13) Backend APIs /api/phonic/harmony-score and /api/phonic/streak-status return valid responses.

console_playground_toggle.details: Mode toggle renders with Console and Playground buttons, switching works correctly

orbital_mixer_renders.details: OrbitalMixer renders in Playground mode with orbital rings, bubbles, player hub

tap_to_toggle.details: Clicking bubble activates/deactivates corresponding audio module

active_visual_feedback.details: Active modules show glowing border, tether lines, hub dot count

clear_all_button.details: Clear All button appears when modules active, clears all on click

locked_modules.details: I Ching, Fractal L², Cosmic Map show lock icon and are not draggable

console_accordion_sections.details: Console mode accordion sections render and work when mode is 'Console'

backend_harmony_score.details: POST /api/phonic/harmony-score returns score, grade, breakdown, insight

mobile_viewport.details: Mobile shows larger touch targets (52px) and adjusted ring radii

waveform_visualizer.details: Waveform visualizer shows audio activity when modules are activated
